title: Product Sentiment Analysis
description: The system processes the input (amazon or daraz product url)using NLP techniques and generates insights such as sentiment distribution, key terms, and overall product perception.

title: Maternal Health Risk Triage System using Machine Learning
description: This project aims to develop a machine learning–based Maternal Health Risk Triage System that can assist in early risk prediction by analyzing patient health parameters and classifying pregnant women into different risk categories such as Low Risk, Medium Risk, and High Risk.

title: salary analyzer
description: Using CVS datasets and common algorithms as mean, standared deviation sorting high to low.

title: Air Pollution Analysis
description: The goal of this project is to analyze and predict air quality.

title: Simulation of a real-world business intelligence task
description:
This project simulates a real-world business intelligence task, and deals with missing data, data types, and time-series analysis. 
Libraries Used: Pandas (heavily), NumPy, Matplotlib.
